prompt: I'm about to write the definition-of-done for the work above, to run in a Claude Code session in this repo. Before drafting it, take stock of which Claude Code skills, commands, agents, and hooks are actually installed in this environment — then write the DoD leaning on them: reference the relevant ones by name, defer each convention to the skill that owns it instead of restating its contents, and don't invent capabilities that aren't installed.
